parameters.requirement: Cell voltage, temp, SOC, SOH monitoring
Over-voltage, under-voltage, over-current, over-temp, ground fault
Seismic Zone III (IS 1893:2016) — Zone Factor Z=0.16, Importance Factor I=1.5, Response Reduction R=4.0
Multi-level: smoke, heat, gas (CO, H2, VOC)

parameters.parameter: DC Bus Voltage Range within Container
DC Disconnect / Circuit Breaker per Container

parameters.requirement: Earthing per IS 3043:2018 & IEC 62485 — max earth resistance ≤1 Ω, copper earth strip, equipotential bonding of all metallic parts
Lightning protection per IEC 62305 — LPL II minimum, external air terminals + down conductors, SPDs at AC & DC entry points
Aggregate all racks, interface with EMS/PCS

Per IEC 62443 — Role-based access control (RBAC), encrypted communications (TLS 1.2+), secure boot, firmware signing, audit logging, and network segmentation. Hardware security module (HSM) recommended.

parameters.requirement: Per CEA Technical Standards (2019) & CERC Ancillary Services Regulations — OEM to specify maximum ramp rate in MW/s (typical ≥50 MW/s for BESS)
1% of contract value per 1% shortfall in MW capacity below guaranteed 200 MW; proportional for partial shortfall
1% of contract value per 1% shortfall in MWh energy below guaranteed 400 MWh; measured annually at POI
0.5% of contract value per 0.5% shortfall below guaranteed RTE at POI; measured as annual weighted average including aux consumption
0.5% of contract value per 1% shortfall below 97% annual availability; excludes planned maintenance per agreed schedule
0.5% per week, max 5% of contract value
Aggregate LD cap: 10% of total contract value (sum of all performance LDs + delay LDs)
2% of total modules — for commissioning + 12-year O&M pool
1 set per BMS hierarchy level (cell/module/rack/system) — minimum 4 cards total
1 IGBT / power module stack per PCS unit type — minimum 2 sets for 200 MW plant
1 per PCS unit type — minimum 2 boards
2 fans per PCS unit type — minimum 4 fans total
1 per PCS unit type — minimum 2 cards
2% of total installed contactors/breakers — minimum 4 units
5% of total installed fuses — by rating type (string / module)
2% of total installed CTs — by rating type
2% of total installed PTs — by rating type
2% of total installed sensors — minimum 10 per type (NTC/PTC)
1 control PCB per 10 containers — minimum 2 units
1 refill set per 10 containers — must include agent + actuator + nozzles
2% of total installed sensors per type (H₂, CO, VOC) — minimum 4 per gas type
2% of total installed detectors — minimum 6 units
1 complete redundant server set (main + standby) with pre-loaded software image
1 per switch/card type — minimum 4 units; include managed switches + media converters
2% of total installed SPDs — both AC and DC types by rating
2% of total installed cable length — power cables by cross-section; comms cables by type
1 complete set — include insulation tester, battery impedance tester, IR thermometer, torque tools, fiber splice kit
